title: crotalaria calva
intro: Crotalaria calva is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, and its seeds have been traditionally used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties. The seeds of Crotalaria calva are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and has been reported to have potential health benefits in reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function.
